clips.title: Rooftop Wind
clips.prompt: Cel-shaded anime style, hand-drawn Japanese animation, clean bold linework, flat cel shading, vibrant color. Present day. A high-school rooftop at sunset, chain-link fence, a sprawling city and orange sky beyond. Evening, warm breeze. A person in a school uniform stands at the fence, hair and tie streaming in the wind, looking out. A schoolbag, the setting sun, drifting clouds. Warm golden-hour anime lighting, saturated sky. 35mm feel, slow dolly in. Crisp anime aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Petal Duel
clips.prompt: Cel-shaded anime style, hand-drawn Japanese animation, clean bold linework, flat cel shading, vibrant color. Feudal era. A serene bamboo forest, shafts of light, pink petals drifting. Daytime, still. A person in a flowing kimono grips a katana in a ready stance, cloth and petals swirling. A sheath, falling leaves, tall green stalks. Dappled light through bamboo, cool green with warm accents. 40mm feel, side tracking. Dynamic anime aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Window Seat
clips.prompt: Cel-shaded anime style, hand-drawn Japanese animation, clean bold linework, flat cel shading, vibrant color. Present day. A quiet local train interior, empty seats, green rice fields sliding past the window. Afternoon, calm. A person in casual clothes rests by the window, chin on hand, watching the countryside. A backpack, a hanging strap, sunlight on the seats. Soft warm afternoon light, gentle palette. 50mm feel, static. Wistful anime aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Cockpit
clips.prompt: Cel-shaded anime style, hand-drawn Japanese animation, clean bold linework, flat cel shading, vibrant color. Sci-fi future. The tight cockpit of a giant mech, glowing holographic HUD, control grips. Night, tense. A person in a pilot suit grips the controls, determined, HUD light on the visor. Blinking readouts, harness straps, a reflected alert glow. Cool blue HUD glow with red alerts, high contrast. 35mm feel, slow dolly in. Intense anime aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Cat Cafe
clips.prompt: Cel-shaded anime style, hand-drawn Japanese animation, clean bold linework, flat cel shading, vibrant color. Present day. A cozy cat cafe, cats lounging on shelves, plants, warm wood. Afternoon, cozy. A person in a soft sweater sits at a table offering a hand to a curious cat, smiling gently. A teacup, a cat tower, sunny window. Warm soft afternoon light, pastel palette. 50mm feel, slow dolly in. Cozy anime aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Festival Night
clips.prompt: Cel-shaded anime style, hand-drawn Japanese animation, clean bold linework, flat cel shading, vibrant color. Present day. A summer night festival, rows of paper lanterns, food stalls, fireworks blooming above. Night, festive. A person in a yukata stands among the lights looking up at the fireworks, holding a candied apple. Lanterns, a goldfish bag, a crowd blurred. Warm lantern glow with colorful firework light. 28mm feel, crane rise. Magical anime aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Transformation
clips.prompt: Cel-shaded anime style, hand-drawn Japanese animation, clean bold linework, flat cel shading, vibrant color. Present day. A swirl of sparkling light and ribbons against a starry magical backdrop. Night, dazzling. A person in a flowing costume rises mid-transformation, arms sweeping, glowing sparkles trailing. Ribbons, star bursts, a glowing pendant. Bright magical rim light, saturated pinks and blues. 40mm feel, slow orbit. Sparkling anime aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Midnight Ramen
clips.prompt: Cel-shaded anime style, hand-drawn Japanese animation, clean bold linework, flat cel shading, vibrant color. Present day. A tiny late-night ramen stall, steam rising, red lanterns, neon alley behind. Night, quiet. A person in a coat sits at the counter lifting noodles with chopsticks, steam on the face. A ramen bowl, a hanging menu, neon reflections. Warm stall light with cool neon spill. 50mm feel, slow dolly in. Moody anime aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: First Bloom
clips.prompt: Cel-shaded anime style, hand-drawn Japanese animation, clean bold linework, flat cel shading, vibrant color. Present day. A school courtyard in full cherry blossom, petals raining down, a path lined with pink trees. Morning, bright. A person in a school uniform walks the petal path, satchel over shoulder, glancing up. Falling petals, a bench, distant school building. Soft bright morning light, pink and green palette. 35mm feel, side tracking. Fresh anime aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Far Shore
clips.prompt: Cel-shaded anime style, hand-drawn Japanese animation, clean bold linework, flat cel shading, vibrant color. Fantasy world. A grassy cliff over a vast turquoise sea, floating islands in a huge sky. Daytime, epic. A person in a traveler's cloak stands at the cliff edge, cloak billowing, gazing at the horizon. Wildflowers, a walking staff, distant birds. Bright fantasy daylight, saturated blues and greens. 28mm feel, static wide. Epic anime aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Rain Walk
clips.prompt: Cel-shaded anime style, hand-drawn Japanese animation, clean bold linework, flat cel shading, vibrant color. Present day. A rainy city street at dusk, glowing shop signs, wet reflections on the pavement. Evening, rain. A person in a raincoat holds a clear umbrella, pausing to watch the rain, soft expression. Puddle reflections, a vending machine glow, falling rain lines. Cool blue rain with warm sign glow. 50mm feel, slow dolly in. Atmospheric anime aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Late Study
clips.prompt: Cel-shaded anime style, hand-drawn Japanese animation, clean bold linework, flat cel shading, vibrant color. Present day. A cozy bedroom at night, a desk lamp, string lights, a window with city lights. Night, quiet. A person in comfy clothes sits at the desk over open notebooks, pencil in hand, mid-thought. A mug, stacked textbooks, a sleeping cat. Warm lamp glow with cool window light. 50mm feel, slow dolly in. Cozy anime aesthetic, 24fps.
